Metadata.CommitMsg:
fix(scans): apply ignore files in containerized invocations

Three script bugs found while validating the Phase 4 ignore files:

- scan-sast.sh: Brakeman in the official image runs from /code and
  defaults to config/brakeman.ignore for auto-discovery, missing the
  root-level .brakeman.ignore convention. Pass --ignore-config explicitly.
- scan-secrets.sh: 'git ls-files' includes .brakeman.ignore whose
  sha256 fingerprints trip 'Hex High Entropy String' as false positive;
  filter the file out (same exclusion as in .pre-commit-config.yaml).
- scan-image.sh + scan-sca.sh: Trivy in the container needs an explicit
  --ignorefile path because the docker -v mount didn't include -w /src
  for the image scans, so cwd-based .trivyignore lookup missed.
- generate-sbom.sh: Grype doesn't read .trivyignore (different format);
  added .grype.yaml mirroring the same CVE list and pass --config.

After these fixes:
  Secrets   OK   0 new vs baseline
  SAST      OK   Brakeman 0 (18 ignored), Semgrep 22 < ERROR
  SCA       OK   Trivy fs 0 CRITICAL
  Image     OK   Trivy OS+libs 0 (residuals via .trivyignore)
  DAST      OK   ZAP 0 High
  SBOM      OK   Grype 0 Critical (residuals via .grype.yaml)
Metadata.Author: Setounkpe7 <mdoubogan@yahoo.fr>
